element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Tutorial levels establish core push/pull and enemy avoidance
New mechanic limiting crossing attempts to 2; introduces resource scarcity concept
Line-of-sight suction attack; adds spatial risk management; can cause stuck states requiring restart
Levels 4–7, 9–12, and 17 feature boss rooms; climactic puzzle challenges

typical_relief_triggers: Successful puzzle solution returns player to overworld
Select button allows immediate level restart without death penalty
Training rooms (10 rooms across two trees) provide low-stakes practice
typical_tension_triggers: Crumbling bridge mechanic: two-crossing limit forces commitment
Moby suction attacks in underwater levels create spatial traps
Multi-room levels (Levels 3, 13, 17 have 10 rooms each) extend puzzle chains
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Segmented relief cycle; puzzle-by-puzzle clearing with immediate restart option reduces frustration. Boss concentration in certain level clusters (4–7, 9–12, 17) creates tension waves. Training rooms break difficulty progression.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Two big trees on overworld map signal training room locations (5 rooms per tree, 10 total); optional skill-building without story progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial levels with character selection (Lolo or Lala, functionally identical) introduce mechanics safely
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Crumbling bridge and Moby mechanics introduced; levels 4–7 escalate with first boss cluster
difficulty_curve.late_game: Levels 9–12 continue boss encounters; Level 17 (10 rooms + boss) represents cumulative complexity peak
notable_spikes: Level 4: First boss encounter (end of initial learning phase)
Levels 9–12: Second boss cluster with both crumbling bridges and Moby present
Level 17: Final level combines maximum room count (10) with boss climax

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels 1–2 establish core mechanics with character-specific dialogue. No lives system allows consequence-free experimentation.
Early levels focus on basic push/pull puzzles; crumbling bridges arrive mid-progression; Moby enemies isolated to underwater level clusters; bosses concentrate in phases (4–7, 9–12, 17)
Levels 3, 13, and 17 contain 10 rooms each versus standard 5-room levels. Creates extended puzzle chains; Level 17 (final) combines max rooms with narrative climax.
Two overworld trees contain 5 training rooms each (10 total). Optional, low-stakes space for skill consolidation outside main progression.
